title: CI_FAILURE_ATTRIBUTION_AND_FIX_GATE

pressure_assessment.reason: CI attribution only; no code modification. PASSED WITH WARNINGS — bootstrap-related lint issue found but merge gate evidence generated.

backend_unit_failure_summary: Test collection errors (23 errors during collection, 2344 tests collected) — unrelated to bootstrap chain. CI infrastructure issue. bootstrap chain has NO backend test coverage in PR #3.

failure_correlation.lint_failure_path: .github (annotation level) — actual issue is F811/I001 in local_provider.py

Also finds E402 config.py import-not-at-top-of-file and F811 BaseModel/Field redefinition in config.py.
